title: Refactor test stubs: extend makeNoHintCategoryMapping(); add makeCategoryMappingStub()
description: Refactor tests/fixtures/stubs.js to support direct-assign testing: (1) extend existing makeNoHintCategoryMapping() to also expose getDirectAssignment: () => ({assigned: false}) — backward-compat for case-1..4; (2) add new helper makeCategoryMappingStub({directAssignment = {assigned:false}, aiHint = null}) that returns an object with both getAiHint() and getDirectAssignment() methods, configurable via parameters.
notes: Stub refactor is backward-compat — makeNoHintCategoryMapping() signature unchanged, only return object extended. Default directAssignment param is {assigned:false}, default aiHint param is null. Pattern mirrors existing stubs (makeAccountMappingStub, makeAutoCatStub).
verification_steps: makeNoHintCategoryMapping() exposes both getAiHint() and getDirectAssignment() methods.
makeCategoryMappingStub({directAssignment, aiHint}) returns stub with both methods.
Existing case-1..4 tests still pass without modification.
New helper supports all parameter combinations needed by case-5..7.
